heading: Required Access
body:
To view backup snapshots, you must have at least [Project Backup Creator](<Project Backup Creator>) or [Project Read Only](<Project Read Only>) access to the project.
Users with  [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add themselves as
a [Project Read Only](<Project Read Only>) access to the project before they can
view backup policies.

To take or delete a backup snapshot, you must have [Project Backup Creator](<Project Backup Creator>), [Project Backup Manager](<Project Backup Manager>) or
[Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project. Users with
[Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add themselves as a
[Project Backup Creator](<Project Backup Creator>), [Project Backup Manager](<Project Backup Manager>),
or [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project before they can take
or delete a backup snapshot.
